queries.query: Run differential expression analysis on this bulk RNA-seq count matrix comparing treated vs control samples. Use adjusted p-value threshold of 0.05 and generate a volcano plot.
queries.data_info: CSV count matrix with genes as rows, samples as columns. Metadata CSV with sample names and condition column (treated/control).

queries.query: Perform DESeq2 analysis on RNA-seq counts, identify the top 20 differentially expressed genes by log2 fold change, and create a heatmap of their expression across samples.
queries.data_info: CSV count matrix with genes as rows, samples as columns. Metadata CSV with condition column.

queries.query: Run differential expression between wild-type and knockout samples. Filter for genes with absolute log2 fold change greater than 1 and adjusted p-value less than 0.01. Save the filtered results.
queries.data_info: CSV count matrix. Metadata with genotype column (WT/KO).

queries.query: Analyze this RNA-seq dataset for differential expression. Generate an MA plot showing log2 fold change vs mean expression, highlighting significant genes in red.
queries.data_info: CSV count matrix with condition metadata.

queries.query: Compare gene expression between drug-treated and DMSO control groups. Run DESeq2, apply log2 fold change shrinkage, and export the full results table sorted by adjusted p-value.
queries.data_info: Count matrix CSV. Metadata with treatment column (drug/DMSO).

queries.query: Perform PCA on the variance-stabilized counts from this RNA-seq experiment and color the samples by condition to check for batch effects.
queries.data_info: CSV count matrix. Metadata with condition and batch columns.

queries.query: Run differential expression analysis and generate both a volcano plot and a table of the top 50 upregulated genes sorted by log2 fold change.
queries.data_info: Count matrix CSV with treated vs untreated metadata.

queries.query: Normalize the count matrix using DESeq2 size factors and export the normalized counts as a CSV for downstream analysis.
queries.data_info: Raw count matrix CSV with metadata.

queries.query: Process this single-cell RNA-seq dataset: filter low quality cells, normalize, find highly variable genes, run PCA, compute neighbors, cluster with Leiden algorithm, and visualize with UMAP.
queries.data_info: h5ad file with raw counts in .X

queries.query: Analyze this scRNA-seq data. Filter cells with fewer than 200 genes or more than 5000 genes, and cells with more than 10% mitochondrial genes. Normalize to 10000 counts per cell, log transform, and cluster.
queries.data_info: h5ad file, gene names in .var_names

queries.query: Find marker genes for each cluster in this scRNA-seq dataset using the Wilcoxon rank-sum test. Show the top 5 markers per cluster in a dot plot.
queries.data_info: Pre-processed h5ad with leiden clusters in .obs['leiden']

queries.query: Run the standard scanpy preprocessing pipeline on this 10x Genomics dataset: filter, normalize, HVG selection, PCA with 50 components, neighbors with 15 neighbors, UMAP, and Leiden clustering at resolution 0.5.
queries.data_info: h5ad from 10x Cell Ranger output

queries.query: Compare gene expression between two conditions in my single-cell data. Split cells by the 'treatment' column in obs, run differential expression per cluster using Wilcoxon test, and show results as a volcano plot per cluster.
queries.data_info: h5ad with 'treatment' and 'leiden' in .obs

queries.query: Perform trajectory analysis on this scRNA-seq dataset. After standard preprocessing, compute diffusion pseudotime starting from the stem cell cluster and visualize the trajectory on UMAP.
queries.data_info: h5ad file with cell type annotations

queries.query: Create a UMAP visualization colored by cell type, and generate a stacked violin plot showing expression of genes CD3D, CD8A, CD14, MS4A1, and FOXP3 across cell types.
queries.data_info: Processed h5ad with cell_type in .obs

queries.query: Subsample this scRNA-seq dataset to 5000 cells, re-run the full analysis pipeline (normalize, HVG, PCA, neighbors, UMAP, Leiden), and compare cluster proportions between conditions.
queries.data_info: Large h5ad with condition in .obs

queries.query: Create a publication-quality volcano plot from these DE results. Color significant genes (padj < 0.05, |log2FC| > 1) in red, label the top 10 genes by significance.
queries.data_info: CSV with columns: gene, log2FoldChange, padj

queries.query: Generate a heatmap of the top 30 differentially expressed genes across all samples, with hierarchical clustering on both rows and columns. Use a red-blue color scheme.
queries.data_info: Normalized count matrix CSV + DE results CSV

queries.query: Create a PCA plot of the samples, colored by condition, with sample labels. Include the percentage of variance explained on each axis.
queries.data_info: Normalized count matrix CSV with metadata

queries.query: Make a bar plot showing the number of upregulated and downregulated genes at different significance thresholds (0.05, 0.01, 0.001).
queries.data_info: DE results CSV with log2FoldChange and padj columns

queries.query: Plot the expression of gene TP53 across all samples as a box plot grouped by condition, with individual data points overlaid.
queries.data_info: Normalized count matrix CSV with metadata

queries.query: Generate a correlation heatmap between all samples using Spearman correlation on the normalized counts.
queries.data_info: Normalized count matrix CSV

queries.query: Create a dot plot showing average expression and percent of cells expressing genes CD3D, CD14, NKG7, MS4A1 across each cluster.
queries.data_info: Processed h5ad with clusters

queries.query: Generate a UMAP embedding and color cells by expression of gene EPCAM using a viridis colormap. Save as high-resolution PNG.
queries.data_info: Processed h5ad

queries.query: Create a multi-panel figure: top-left shows a volcano plot, top-right shows a heatmap of top 20 DE genes, bottom shows a PCA colored by condition.
queries.data_info: DE results CSV + normalized counts CSV + metadata
